requirement_topic.en: In-Country Importer / Korean Representative Registration (NRRA / KATS)
requirement_topic.zh: 境内进口商 / 韩国代理人注册（NRRA / KATS）
requirement_topic.zht: 境內進口商 / 韓國代理人注冊（NRRA / KATS）

summary.en: Foreign manufacturers exporting wireless and IoT devices to South Korea must appoint an in-country Korean importer or authorised representative as the responsible entity for regulatory compliance and KC certification obligations. Under the Radio Waves Act (전파법) and the Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Act (전기용품 및 생활용품 안전관리법), the KC certificate and related technical documentation (test reports, declaration of conformity, user manuals) must be held by the Korean importer or responsible party and made available to NRRA or KATS upon request. The Korean importer or representative must be a legally registered entity in South Korea. The importer is responsible for: (1) holding KC certification documents and test reports; (2) ensuring the KC certification number and label appear correctly on the product; (3) notifying NRRA / KATS of any product changes that may affect certification validity; (4) handling post-market surveillance obligations including recall cooperation if required by KATS. For customs clearance, the KC certification number must be declared to Korea Customs Service (KCS) and the importer is liable if uncertified or mislabelled products are imported. Unlike the US FCC which requires an agent designation form submitted to FCC, Korean KC importer responsibility is established through the KC certification application process where the Korean importer or representative is named as the certification holder or local contact.
summary.zh: 向韩国出口无线及物联网设备的境外制造商须指定境内韩国进口商或授权代理人，作为监管合规及KC认证义务的责任主体。依据《电波法》（전파법）及《电气用品及生活用品安全管理法》（전기용품 및 생활용품 안전관리법），KC证书及相关技术文件（测试报告、符合性声明、用户手册）须由韩国进口商或责任方持有，并在NRRA或KATS要求时予以提供。韩国进口商或代理人须为在韩合法注册实体。进口商的责任包括：（1）持有KC认证文件和测试报告；（2）确保产品上正确标注KC认证编号和标签；（3）就可能影响认证有效性的产品变更通知NRRA / KATS；（4）履行上市后监管义务，包括在KATS要求时配合召回。在海关清关环节，须向韩国海关（KCS）申报KC认证编号，若进口未认证或错误标注的产品，进口商须承担相应责任。与美国FCC须向FCC提交代理人指定表格不同，韩国KC进口商责任通过KC认证申请程序确立，其中韩国进口商或代理人被列为认证持有人或本地联系人。
summary.zht: 向韓國出口無線及物聯網裝置的境外製造商須指定境內韓國進口商或授權代理人，作為監管合規及KC認證義務的責任主體。依據《電波法》（전파법）及《電氣用品及生活用品安全管理法》（전기용품 및 생활용품 안전관리법），KC證書及相關技術文件（測試報告、符合性聲明、用戶手冊）須由韓國進口商或責任方持有，並在NRRA或KATS要求時予以提供。韓國進口商或代理人須為在韓合法注冊實體。進口商的責任包括：（1）持有KC認證文件和測試報告；（2）確保產品上正確標注KC認證編號和標籤；（3）就可能影響認證有效性的產品變更通知NRRA / KATS；（4）履行上市後監管義務，包括在KATS要求時配合召回。在海關清關環節，須向韓國海關（KCS）申報KC認證編號，若進口未認證或錯誤標注的產品，進口商須承擔相應責任。與美國FCC須向FCC提交代理人指定表格不同，韓國KC進口商責任通過KC認證申請程序確立，其中韓國進口商或代理人被列為認證持有人或本地聯系人。

standards_or_laws: Radio Waves Act (전파법) — KC certification holder / importer responsibility for radio equipment (NRRA / MSIT)
Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Act (전기용품 및 생활용품 안전관리법) — importer obligations for KC safety and EMC certified products (KATS / MOTIE)
Korea Customs Service (KCS) — KC certification number declaration requirement at customs clearance

summary.en: China does not require a separate in-country importer registration or representative designation for foreign manufacturers exporting wireless and IoT devices to China under the SRRC and CCC frameworks; instead, the Chinese applicant (which may be the manufacturer directly or a Chinese importer) holds the SRRC type approval and CCC certificate in their own name. A Chinese entity that acts as the manufacturer's importer or agent may hold the CCC certificate on the manufacturer's behalf. There is no direct Chinese equivalent to South Korea's in-country importer registration obligation as a distinct compliance step.
summary.zh: 对于向中国出口无线及物联网设备的境外制造商，中国SRRC和CCC框架下不要求单独进行境内进口商注册或代理人指定；申请人（可为制造商本身或中国进口商）以自身名义持有SRRC型号核准及CCC证书。充当制造商进口商或代理人的中国实体可代制造商持有CCC证书。就独立合规步骤而言，中国没有与韩国境内进口商注册义务直接对应的要求。
summary.zht: 對於向中國出口無線及物聯網裝置的境外製造商，中國SRRC和CCC框架下不要求單獨進行境內進口商注冊或代理人指定；申請人（可為製造商本身或中國進口商）以自身名義持有SRRC型號核准及CCC證書。充當製造商進口商或代理人的中國實體可代製造商持有CCC證書。就獨立合規步驟而言，中國沒有與韓國境內進口商注冊義務直接對應的要求。

standards_or_laws: Radio Regulations of the People's Republic of China (2016) — SRRC applicant (manufacturer or Chinese entity) holds type approval certificate
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — certificate holder is the manufacturer or designated Chinese entity (CNCA)

gap.en: South Korea requires a legally registered Korean entity (importer or authorised representative) to be named as the KC certification holder or responsible party before market entry — this is a distinct administrative compliance step with no direct Chinese domestic equivalent. Key gaps: (1) Chinese manufacturers exporting directly to Korean distributors or end-customers without appointing a registered Korean importer as KC certificate holder will be non-compliant — the KC certificate must name a Korean entity; (2) the Korean importer must be capable of responding to NRRA / KATS surveillance requests and managing recall obligations — appointing a nominee entity without substance creates regulatory and liability risk; (3) at Korean customs clearance, the KC certification number must be declared and the importer is the party of record — manufacturers without a Korean importer cannot clear customs for KC-subject products; (4) a common practical gap: Chinese manufacturers obtain KC certification in the manufacturer's own name without a Korean entity listed — this may not meet NRRA requirements where a Korean domestic contact is mandated for post-market compliance. Manufacturers should confirm the importer designation requirement with their NRRA-designated lab or a Korean regulatory consultant before applying for KC certification.
gap.zh: 韩国要求在产品进入市场前，将合法注册的韩国实体（进口商或授权代理人）列为KC认证持有人或责任方——这是一个独立的行政合规步骤，在中国国内无直接对应要求。主要差距：（1）直接向韩国经销商或终端用户出口、未将注册韩国进口商列为KC证书持有人的中国制造商将不合规——KC证书须列明韩国实体；（2）韩国进口商须具备响应NRRA / KATS监管要求及管理召回义务的能力——指定无实质内容的名义实体会带来监管和责任风险；（3）在韩国海关清关环节，须申报KC认证编号，进口商为记录在案的责任方——未设立韩国进口商的制造商无法为KC管制产品办理清关手续；（4）常见实际差距：中国制造商以制造商自身名义取得KC认证，未列明韩国实体——这可能不符合NRRA关于上市后合规须有韩国境内联系人的要求。制造商在申请KC认证前，应与NRRA指定实验室或韩国监管顾问确认进口商指定要求。
gap.zht: 韓國要求在產品進入市場前，將合法注冊的韓國實體（進口商或授權代理人）列為KC認證持有人或責任方——這是一個獨立的行政合規步驟，在中國國內無直接對應要求。主要差距：（1）直接向韓國經銷商或終端用戶出口、未將注冊韓國進口商列為KC證書持有人的中國製造商將不合規——KC證書須列明韓國實體；（2）韓國進口商須具備響應NRRA / KATS監管要求及管理召回義務的能力——指定無實質內容的名義實體會帶來監管和責任風險；（3）在韓國海關清關環節，須申報KC認證編號，進口商為記錄在案的責任方——未設立韓國進口商的製造商無法為KC管制產品辦理清關手續；（4）常見實際差距：中國製造商以製造商自身名義取得KC認證，未列明韓國實體——這可能不符合NRRA關於上市後合規須有韓國境內聯繫人的要求。製造商在申請KC認證前，應與NRRA指定實驗室或韓國監管顧問確認進口商指定要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — a legally registered Korean entity (importer or authorised representative) must be named as KC certification holder or responsible contact before South Korea market entry under Radio Waves Act and Electrical Appliances and Consumer Products Safety Act
mandatory_status.cn: Not directly applicable — SRRC and CCC frameworks allow manufacturer or Chinese entity to hold certification; no separate importer registration step mandated for foreign wireless/IoT device exports to China

source.publisher: National Radio Research Agency (NRRA) — South Korea

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A legally registered Korean importer or authorised representative must be named as the KC certification holder or responsible party before any wireless or IoT device subject to KC certification can be imported or marketed in South Korea. Chinese manufacturers without a Korean entity in place cannot legally import KC-subject products or clear Korean customs. The Korean importer bears ongoing post-market surveillance and recall obligations under NRRA and KATS. Confirm specific importer designation requirements with the NRRA-designated KC lab or a Korean regulatory consultant before KC certification application.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 须KC认证的无线及物联网设备进口或于韩国销售前，须将合法注册的韩国进口商或授权代理人列为KC认证持有人或责任方。未在韩国设立实体的中国制造商无法合法进口受KC管制产品或办理韩国海关清关手续。韩国进口商承担NRRA和KATS规定的持续上市后监管及召回义务。在提交KC认证申请前，应与NRRA指定KC实验室或韩国监管顾问确认具体进口商指定要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 須KC認證的無線及物聯網裝置進口或於韓國銷售前，須將合法注冊的韓國進口商或授權代理人列為KC認證持有人或責任方。未在韓國設立實體的中國製造商無法合法進口受KC管制產品或辦理韓國海關清關手續。韓國進口商承擔NRRA和KATS規定的持續上市後監管及召回義務。在提交KC認證申請前，應與NRRA指定KC實驗室或韓國監管顧問確認具體進口商指定要求。
